tasks.subject: Task 0: Bootstrap Next.js 15 app
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Project scaffolds, dev server runs at :3005, dark-themed placeholder home page renders.

**Files:** package.json, tsconfig.json, next.config.ts, postcss.config.mjs, .gitignore, README.md, app/layout.tsx, app/globals.css, app/page.tsx

**Verify:** `npm run typecheck && curl -sI http://localhost:3005 | head -1`

```json:metadata
{"files":["package.json","tsconfig.json","next.config.ts","postcss.config.mjs",".gitignore","README.md","app/layout.tsx","app/globals.css","app/page.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm run typecheck && curl -sI http://localhost:3005 | head -1","acceptanceCriteria":["npm install succeeds","typecheck passes","dev server on 3005","home page renders dark theme"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Tutorial schema types and example fixture
Task 2: Tutorial loader with Vitest tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** discoverTutorials, loadTutorial, loadIntro, loadSection — TDD with Vitest.

**Files:** package.json (vitest, js-yaml, gray-matter), vitest.config.ts, lib/tutorials.ts, lib/tutorials.test.ts

**Verify:** `npm test`

```json:metadata
{"files":["package.json","vitest.config.ts","lib/tutorials.ts","lib/tutorials.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm test","acceptanceCriteria":["discoverTutorials","loadTutorial","loadIntro","loadSection atomic+subdivided","clear errors on missing","all tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Server-side markdown rendering with Shiki
tasks.description:
**Goal:** renderMarkdown(body, ctx) → {html, toc}. Shiki highlighting; relative .md links rewritten.

**Files:** package.json (unified, remark-*, rehype-*, @shikijs/rehype, unist-util-visit), lib/markdown.ts, lib/markdown.test.ts, components/MarkdownBody.tsx

**Verify:** `npm test -- markdown`

```json:metadata
{"files":["package.json","lib/markdown.ts","lib/markdown.test.ts","components/MarkdownBody.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npm test -- markdown","acceptanceCriteria":["html+toc returned","Shiki highlighting","relative .md links rewritten","absolute links untouched","TOC h2/h3","tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Tutorial library home page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** / shows card grid for each tutorial under public/tutorials/.

**Files:** app/page.tsx, components/TutorialCard.tsx

**Verify:** Visit http://localhost:3005/, see card linking to /t/example-repo/.

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/page.tsx","components/TutorialCard.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"manual: visit http://localhost:3005/","acceptanceCriteria":["card per tutorial","title/summary/date","links to /t/<slug>/","sorted by generatedAt desc"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Tutorial shell layout with left nav
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Persistent shell at /t/[slug]/* with left sidebar component tree.

**Files:** app/t/[slug]/layout.tsx, components/TutorialNav.tsx (client component)

**Verify:** Visit /t/example-repo/, sidebar shows Backend/Infrastructure/Frontend (with Routing+State management nested).

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/t/[slug]/layout.tsx","components/TutorialNav.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"manual: visit /t/example-repo/","acceptanceCriteria":["shell on all /t/[slug]/* routes","components listed","sub-sections nested","current entry highlighted","back link"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Tutorial overview page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /t/[slug]/ renders intro.md plus styled component index.

**Files:** app/t/[slug]/page.tsx

**Verify:** Visit /t/example-repo/.

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/t/[slug]/page.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"manual: visit /t/example-repo/","acceptanceCriteria":["intro.md renders","component list shown","links work","404 on unknown slug"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Component page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /t/[slug]/[component]/ renders index.md, lists sub-sections if subdivided.

**Files:** app/t/[slug]/[component]/page.tsx

**Verify:** Visit /t/example-repo/backend/ and /t/example-repo/frontend/.

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/t/[slug]/[component]/page.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"manual: visit /t/example-repo/backend/","acceptanceCriteria":["index.md renders","sub-section list","static params","404 on unknown"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Sub-section page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /t/[slug]/[component]/[sub]/ renders sub-section markdown.

**Files:** app/t/[slug]/[component]/[sub]/page.tsx

**Verify:** Visit /t/example-repo/frontend/routing/.

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/t/[slug]/[component]/[sub]/page.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"manual: visit /t/example-repo/frontend/routing/","acceptanceCriteria":["sub.md renders","static params triples","404 on unknown"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Cross-references — Related footer + path helpers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Each section page ends with Related footer combining frontmatter.related + tutorial.cross_refs.

**Files:** lib/paths.ts, components/RelatedFooter.tsx, app/t/[slug]/[component]/page.tsx, app/t/[slug]/[component]/[sub]/page.tsx

**Verify:** Visit /t/example-repo/backend/ and /t/example-repo/iac/.

```json:metadata
{"files":["lib/paths.ts","components/RelatedFooter.tsx","app/t/[slug]/[component]/page.tsx","app/t/[slug]/[component]/[sub]/page.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"manual: visit /t/example-repo/backend/","acceptanceCriteria":["de-duped","frontmatter related","cross_refs from-match","right routes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: In-page TOC
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Right-column auto-TOC (h2/h3). Hidden < lg.

**Files:** components/PageToc.tsx, app/t/[slug]/page.tsx, app/t/[slug]/[component]/page.tsx, app/t/[slug]/[component]/[sub]/page.tsx

**Verify:** Visit page with multiple h2/h3.

```json:metadata
{"files":["components/PageToc.tsx","app/t/[slug]/page.tsx","app/t/[slug]/[component]/page.tsx","app/t/[slug]/[component]/[sub]/page.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"manual: visit a section page","acceptanceCriteria":["PageToc anchor links","empty when no headings","hidden < lg"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: AGENTS.md — agent contract
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Single canonical doc at repo root: pipeline, schemas, tone rules.

**Files:** AGENTS.md

**Verify:** Manual review.

```json:metadata
{"files":["AGENTS.md"],"verifyCommand":"manual review","acceptanceCriteria":["covers stages","schemas","tone rules","references spec"]}
```

{"files":["agents/survey.md"],"verifyCommand":"manual: run on code-explainer","acceptanceCriteria":["complete agent file","references AGENTS.md","manual run produces valid survey"]}

tasks.subject: Task 13: Writer agent definition
tasks.description:

```json:metadata
{"files":["agents/writer.md"],"verifyCommand":"manual: run on one leaf","acceptanceCriteria":["complete agent file","frontmatter spec","manual run useful"]}
```

tasks.description:
**Goal:** agents/synthesizer.md produces intro.md, subdivided index.md, final tutorial.yaml.

**Files:** agents/synthesizer.md

**Verify:** Run after stages 1+2; inspect outputs.

```json:metadata
{"files":["agents/synthesizer.md"],"verifyCommand":"manual: after stages 1+2","acceptanceCriteria":["complete agent file","intro.md spec","bridge spec","tutorial.yaml finalize","cross_refs harvest"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 15: Orchestrator slash command
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Slash command at .claude/commands/build-tutorial.md driving 3 stages with parallel writers.

**Files:** .claude/commands/build-tutorial.md

**Verify:** Run on a small real repo end-to-end.

```json:metadata
{"files":[".claude/commands/build-tutorial.md"],"verifyCommand":"manual: run /build-tutorial","acceptanceCriteria":["takes inputs","stage 1 with approval","parallel stage 2","stage 3","verify between stages","final report"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 16: End-to-end smoke test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run pipeline on /Users/cdavis/github/code-explainer; walk result; refine prompts.

**Files:** May modify agents/*.md, AGENTS.md, public/tutorials/<slug>/.

**Verify:** Manual walkthrough — open ≥3 pages, click 2 cross-refs, judge usefulness.

```json:metadata
{"files":["agents/survey.md","agents/writer.md","agents/synthesizer.md","AGENTS.md"],"verifyCommand":"manual: full walkthrough","acceptanceCriteria":["pipeline runs end-to-end","tutorial loads","navigation works","cross-refs work","prompt refinements committed"]}
```
